title: Weather Catalog
description: Weather-specific UI components for displaying forecasts, conditions, and alerts

allOf.description: A layout component that arranges its children horizontally. To create a grid layout, nest Columns within this Row. Key properties: children (required), gap (spacing between children, default '8px'), padding, justify (start/center/end/spaceBetween/spaceAround/spaceEvenly/stretch), align (start/center/end/stretch; controls vertical alignment). User-Writable: false.

children.description: Defines the children. Use an array of strings for a fixed set of children, or a template object to generate children from a data list. Children cannot be defined inline, they must be referred to by ID.

justify.description: Defines the arrangement of children along the main axis (horizontally). Use 'spaceBetween' to push items to the edges, or 'start'/'end'/'center' to pack them together.

align.description: Defines the alignment of children along the cross axis (vertically). Use 'center' to vertically center items of the same height. Use 'end' when mixing labeled inputs (TextField, Dropdown) with unlabeled components (Button) — aligns bottom edges so the button lines up with the input fields rather than the center of the label+input block.

wrap.description: Defines whether items should wrap to a new line if they exceed the container width.

theme.description: Theme token overrides cascading to all children of this layout container. Useful for scoping a color scheme to a section of the UI. Token-to-element mapping: bg → background of flat Card children; bgRaised → background of raised Card children; textForeground → text color inherited by Text components inside; primary → brand/accent color for Button and icon children; border → border color for Divider and TabularGrid children. Example: { "primary": "#dc2626", "textForeground": "#1e293b" }

allOf.description: A layout component that arranges its children vertically. To create a grid layout, nest Rows within this Column. Key properties: children (required), gap (spacing between children, default '8px'), padding, justify (start/center/end/spaceBetween/spaceAround/spaceEvenly/stretch), align (start/center/end/stretch; controls horizontal alignment of children; default is 'start'; set to 'stretch' for list layouts where children should fill the full width). User-Writable: false.

children.description: Defines the children. Use an array of strings for a fixed set of children, or a template object to generate children from a data list. Children cannot be defined inline, they must be referred to by ID.

justify.description: Defines the arrangement of children along the main axis (vertically). Use 'spaceBetween' to push items to the edges (e.g. header at top, footer at bottom), or 'start'/'end'/'center' to pack them together.

align.description: Defines the alignment of children along the cross axis (horizontally). This is similar to the CSS 'align-items' property.

theme.description: Theme token overrides cascading to all children of this layout container. Useful for scoping a color scheme to a section of the UI. Token-to-element mapping: bg → background of flat Card children; bgRaised → background of raised Card children; textForeground → text color inherited by Text components inside; primary → brand/accent color for Button and icon children; border → border color for Divider and TabularGrid children. Example: { "primary": "#dc2626", "textForeground": "#1e293b" }

allOf.description: A styled container with border and optional shadow. Two variants: 'raised' (default, elevated look with shadow and rounded corners) and 'flat' (no shadow, square corners, background matches the main surface). To make cards stretch to fill their parent's width, either set width to '100%' on the Card, or set align to 'stretch' on the parent Column. Key properties: child (required), variant ('raised'|'flat'), borderWeight (border thickness in px, default 1, 0 removes border), padding, width, height, align ('start'|'center'|'end'|'stretch', aligns children horizontally), justify ('start'|'center'|'end'|'between'|'around', distributes children vertically), zoomable. User-Writable: false.

variant.description: Visual style of the card. 'raised' (default) has a shadow and rounded corners on an elevated background. 'flat' has no shadow, square corners, and blends with the main surface background.

borderWeight.description: Border thickness in pixels. Default is 1. Set to 0 to remove the border entirely.

align.description: Cross-axis alignment of children inside the card. 'start' (default) aligns to the top-left, 'center' centers both horizontally, 'end' aligns to the right, 'stretch' fills full width.

justify.description: Main-axis (vertical) distribution of children inside the card. 'start' (default) stacks from the top, 'center' centers vertically, 'end' aligns to the bottom.

zoomable.description: When true, a small toggle button appears in the top-right corner of the card. Clicking it opens the card in a centered modal overlay at 70% of the viewport width (max 1200px, max 90vh tall); clicking outside or the button again restores it.

child.description: The ID of the single child component to be rendered inside the card. To display multiple elements, you MUST wrap them in a layout component (like Column or Row) and pass that container's ID here. Do NOT pass multiple IDs or a non-existent ID. Do NOT define the child component inline.

theme.description: Theme token overrides for this card and all content inside it. Token-to-element mapping: bgRaised → card background when variant is 'raised' (default); bg → card background when variant is 'flat'; textForeground → primary text color inside the card; textSecondary → secondary/muted text inside the card; border → card border color; primary → accent color for primary buttons or icons inside. Example: { "bgRaised": "#1e3a5f", "textForeground": "#ffffff" }

allOf.description: An empty space component used for layout and spacing. User-Writable: false.

A comprehensive weather summary card for a location. Key properties: location (required), temperature (required), condition (required, e.g. sunny/cloudy/rainy), unit (C/F, default C), humidity (0-100), windSpeed, windUnit (km/h/mph/m/s), feelsLike, background (CSS color override). User-Writable: false.

location.description: City or location name (e.g. 'London', 'New York'). Extract this from the user's request.

allOf.description: A single row in a weather forecast, showing the day's conditions. Key properties: day (required, e.g. 'Mon', 'Today'), high (required), low (required), condition (required), unit (C/F, default C), precipitation (chance percentage 0-100). User-Writable: false.

A container panel that groups ForecastRow children into a titled forecast list. Key properties: children (required, array of ForecastRow IDs or a template), title (default 'Forecast'). User-Writable: false.

children.description: Defines the children. Use an array of strings for a fixed set of children, or a template object to generate children from a data list.

allOf.description: Renders a temperature value with its unit symbol. Key properties: value (required, numeric temperature), unit (C/F, default C), size (sm/md/lg/xl, default lg), color (CSS color). User-Writable: false.

Displays a weather condition icon. Key properties: condition (required, e.g. sunny/cloudy/rainy/stormy/snowy/foggy/windy), size (sm/md/lg/xl, default md), animated (boolean, default false). User-Writable: false.
Displays wind speed and direction. Key properties: speed (required), unit (km/h/mph/m/s, default km/h), direction (cardinal, e.g. N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW), gustSpeed. User-Writable: false.
A gauge that visualizes the current humidity level. Key properties: value (required, percentage 0-100), label (default 'Humidity'). User-Writable: false.
Displays the current UV index with a visual indicator. Key properties: value (required, 0-11+), label (default 'UV Index'). User-Writable: false.

Displays a weather alert or warning banner. Key properties: severity (required, info/advisory/watch/warning), title (required), message (alert description), expires (expiry time). User-Writable: false.

Shows sunrise and sunset times with an optional sun position indicator. Key properties: sunrise (required, e.g. '6:32 AM'), sunset (required, e.g. '7:15 PM'), currentTime (for positioning the sun indicator). User-Writable: false.

currentTime.description: Current time for positioning the sun indicator

allOf.description: Displays the Air Quality Index (AQI) with an optional primary pollutant. Key properties: value (required, AQI 0-500), label (default 'Air Quality'), pollutant (e.g. 'PM2.5', 'O3'). User-Writable: false.

formatString.description: Performs string interpolation of data model values and other functions in the catalog functions list and returns the resulting string. The value string can contain interpolated expressions in the `${expression}` format. Supported expression types include: JSON Pointer paths to the data model (e.g., `${/absolute/path}` or `${relative/path}`), and client-side function calls (e.g., `${now()}`). Function arguments must be literals (quoted strings, numbers, booleans) or nested expressions (e.g., `${formatDate(${/currentDate}, 'MM-dd')}`). To include a literal `${` sequence, escape it as `\${`.

formatDate.description: Formats a timestamp into a string using a pattern.

pattern.description:
A Unicode TR35 date pattern string.

Token Reference:
- Year: 'yy' (26), 'yyyy' (2026)
- Month: 'M' (1), 'MM' (01), 'MMM' (Jan), 'MMMM' (January)
- Day: 'd' (1), 'dd' (01), 'E' (Tue), 'EEEE' (Tuesday)
- Hour (12h): 'h' (1-12), 'hh' (01-12) - requires 'a' for AM/PM
- Hour (24h): 'H' (0-23), 'HH' (00-23) - Military Time
- Minute: 'mm' (00-59)
- Second: 'ss' (00-59)
- Period: 'a' (AM/PM)

Examples:
- 'MMM dd, yyyy' -> 'Jan 16, 2026'
- 'HH:mm' -> '14:30' (Military)
- 'h:mm a' -> '2:30 PM'
- 'EEEE, d MMMM' -> 'Friday, 16 January'

now.description: Returns the current date and time as an ISO 8601 string.

component.description: REQUIRED. The component type name (e.g. 'Text', 'Button', 'Column'). Each component's schema further constrains this to its exact const value.

visible.description: Controls whether the component is rendered. Defaults to true. Use a function call to compute dynamically (e.g. show return date only when trip type is round-trip).

ComponentId.description: The unique identifier for a component, used for both definitions and references within the same surface.

AccessibilityAttributes.description: Attributes to enhance accessibility when using assistive technologies like screen readers.

label.description: A short string, typically 1 to 3 words, used by assistive technologies to convey the purpose or intent of an element. For example, an input field might have an accessible label of 'User ID' or a button might be labeled 'Submit'.

description.description: Additional information provided by assistive technologies about an element such as instructions, format requirements, or result of an action. For example, a mute button might have a label of 'Mute' and a description of 'Silences notifications about this conversation'.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path to a value in the data model.

FunctionCall.description: Invokes a named function on the client.

call.description: The name of the function to call.

returnType.description: The expected return type of the function call.

DynamicValue.description: A value that can be a literal, a path, or a function call returning any type.

DynamicBoolean.description: A boolean value that can be a literal, a path, or a function call returning a boolean.

DynamicNumber.description: Represents a value that can be either a literal number, a path to a number in the data model, or a function call returning a number.

oneOf.description: A static list of child component IDs.
A template for generating a dynamic list of children from a data model list. The `componentId` is the component to use as a template.

path.description: The path to the list of component property objects in the data model.

Theme.description: Design token overrides applied as CSS custom properties (--freesail-*) on this component's root element, cascading to all descendants. Accepts CSS color values (hex, rgb, named) or semantic token names.

bgRaised.description: Raised or elevated surface background color.

bgMuted.description: Muted or subdued surface background color.

primary.description: Brand accent color used for buttons, links, and interactive elements.

primaryHover.description: Brand accent color in hover or focus state.
